source_code:
### Relevant Configuration

```YAML
waste_collection_schedule:
  sources:
    - name: ics
      args:
        url: https://kundenportal.avl-lb.de/WasteManagementLudwigsburg/WasteManagementServiceServlet?ApplicationName=Calendar&SubmitAction=sync&StandortID=918808001&AboID=218383&Fra=RT;PT;LT;GT
      calendar_title: Abfallkalender

sensor:
  # ------- Garbage Collection -------
  # Nächste Abholung Gelber Sack
  - platform: waste_collection_schedule
    name: "Papiertonne"
    value_template: "{% if value.daysTo == 0 %} Heute{% elif value.daysTo == 1 %} Morgen{% else %} {{value.daysTo}} Tage{% endif %}"
    types:
      - Papiertonne
  # Ab hier beliebig oft wiederholbar
  # Nächste Abholung Restmüll
  - platform: waste_collection_schedule
    name: "Restmüll"
    value_template: "{% if value.daysTo == 0 %} Heute{% elif value.daysTo == 1 %} Morgen{% else %} {{value.daysTo}} Tage{% endif %}"
    types:
      - Restmuelltonne
  - platform: waste_collection_schedule
    name: "Gelbe Tonne"
    value_template: "{% if value.daysTo == 0 %} Heute{% elif value.daysTo == 1 %} Morgen{% else %} {{value.daysTo}} Tage{% endif %}"
    types:
      - Gelbe Tonne
  - platform: waste_collection_schedule
    name: "Glas"
    value_template: "{% if value.daysTo == 0 %} Heute{% elif value.daysTo == 1 %} Morgen{% else %} {{value.daysTo}} Tage{% endif %}"
    types:
      - Glas
expected_fix_hint: Check list length before indexing; handle empty sequences.
